body:
**<sub><sub>![P1 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P1-orange?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Respect the service-interception architecture choice**

When a Full wizard user selects service interception, `playback_architecture` is set to `service_interception`, but this new direct-install path still calls `install_setup_files()`, whose implementation always writes/merges `playercorefactory.xml`. In that scenario the wizard re-enables external-player routing immediately after the user chose not to use it; the manual fallback already avoids this by passing `include_playercorefactory=False` for service interception. Please gate this call on the selected architecture or install only the keymap in service-interception mode.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
